chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D-1929 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 1. 2. For hearing of Misc. 9563/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent 2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, the appropriate recourse shall be sought before the quorum of competent jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
